C:\Users\y\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WinGet\Packages\BrechtSanders.WinLibs.POSIX.UCRT_Microsoft.Winget.Source_8wekyb3d8bbwe\mingw64\bin\c++.exe -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\crossbow_backend_tests.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o crossbow_backend_tests.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libcrossbow_backend_tests.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\crossbow_backend_tests.dir\linkLibs.rsp
